questions.question: Write a step-by-step explanation of how the Insertion Sort algorithm works, including its time complexity and space complexity. Be sure to include example inputs and outputs where necessary.
questions.hint: Focus on the key steps of the algorithm and provide examples where possible

questions.question: What is the main difference between Bubble Sort and Selection Sort? Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the main differences in the selection process of each algorithm

questions.question: How does the Insertion Sort algorithm handle duplicate values in the input array? Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on how the algorithm handles duplicate values and provide an example where necessary
